meanings.definition: how a result is obtained or an end is achieved
examples: an example is the best agency of instruction

meanings.definition: an instrumentality for accomplishing some end

examples: he is a man of means

meanings.definition: an average of n numbers computed by adding some function of the numbers and dividing by some function of n
mean or intend to express or convey
examples: You never understand what I mean!
The water shortage means that we have to stop taking long showers
An example sentence would show what this word means

meanings.definition: have in mind as a purpose
examples: I only meant to help you
She didn't think to harm me
We thought to return early that night

meanings.definition: have a specified degree of importance
examples: My ex-husband means nothing to me
I'm thinking of good food when I talk about France
Yes, I meant you when I complained about people who gossip!

meanings.definition: destine or designate for a certain purpose
examples: These flowers were meant for you
